_comment: Hand-maintained regrouping of the build menu tree, layered on top of game_data/generated/buildingCategories.json (the truthful, Docs.json-extracted data) at load time -- never edit buildingCategories.json itself to reorganize the menu, edit this instead. subcategoryOverrides moves an entire internal subcategory (SC_*, see buildingCategories.json/categoryLabels.json) to a different top category in one shot -- every buildable in that subcategory follows it, regardless of which top category Docs.json originally put it under. The target can be an existing internal top category id (e.g. 'Sub_Power') or a brand-new one you invent (like 'Foundation' below); a made-up id needs a display label in topCategoryLabels since it won't be in categoryLabels.json, but overriding onto an existing Sub_* id doesn't (it already has one there).
